summary: Completed LOOP-04 task lifecycle debt settlement and prevention. Migrated the live vault from 199 lifecycle blockers to zero, proved exact rollback and reapply, added recoverable hash-chained migration records, serialized lifecycle writes, added terminal pair transactions, and reran the full completion audit. HG-03 now passes; the global OS completion plan remains incomplete.
decisions: Evidence-free stale tasks are settled as blocked or abandoned and are never represented as completed.
Existing grounded traces are rebound to tasks without changing trace bytes.
Lifecycle migration publication uses a shared lock, source-hash checks, exact local backups, Git recovery refs, and a hash-chained immutable ledger.
The live migration was actually rolled back and reapplied before acceptance.
LOOP-04 remains subject to the required 24-hour real-client soak even though HG-03 passes.
next_steps: Continue the next P0 work package from OS_COMPLETION_EXECUTION_PLAN_20260710.md.
